attributes.action: To put more of the budget into refurbishing or destroying abandoned buildings
attributes.additional_details: We want the government to allocate more of the budget to refurbishing or destroying abandoned buildings due to them becoming too expensive to maintain. They should be refurbished or destroyed so that they are no longer a problem.
attributes.background: We want the government to pay more attention to refurbishing abandoned buildings due to it costing more and more money annually

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do. Decisions about the refurbishment or demolition of derelict buildings are taken by building owners and local councils. 

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do.
